timeline.title: Four clean steps from purchase to connection
timeline.description: We kept the flow simple on purpose. Pick your destination, install the app, activate the eSIM, and land with data already ready to go.
timeline.step1Desc: Search for the country or region you will travel to and view available packages based on data, duration, and price.
timeline.step2Desc: Complete the purchase and manage the package from the app, and keep all eSIM details in one place.
timeline.step3Desc: After payment, use the QR code or manual activation details to add eSIM to your phone.
timeline.step4Desc: Activate the data line when needed and start using the internet during your trip.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our services and solutions.
faq.cta: Have more questions? Contact our support team

items.a: An eSIM is a digital chip embedded in your phone that allows you to add a voice or data plan without using a physical SIM card.

items.q: Does Net Sim offer calls or SMS?
items.a: Most travel plans are data-focused, meaning your messaging and internet calling apps continue to work normally using the data connection.

items.q: Can I purchase a plan from the website?
items.a: Yes. You can select your destination, choose a package, and complete checkout directly on the site.

items.q: Is the price inclusive of fees?
items.a: The amount displayed at checkout is the final total, inclusive of all standard network platform fees.

items.q: Do I need internet to activate eSIM?
items.a: Yes, an active Wi-Fi or cellular internet connection is required to scan the QR code and download the eSIM profile to your device.

items.q: What currency are the prices displayed in?
items.a: All prices are displayed in the standard base currency shown at checkout based on your region.
No, it automatically falls back onto high-speed 4G or LTE networks depending on local carrier coverage at your destination.
Most data plans activate and begin their validity cycle as soon as the eSIM connects to a supported local network abroad.

items.q: What happens if my device doesn't support eSIM?
items.a: Please verify your phone's compatibility list before buying. Refund eligibility depends on whether the profile has been generated.

items.q: Can I use WhatsApp on eSIM?
items.a: Yes. Your WhatsApp account remains fully attached to your original phone number while cellular data runs smoothly through the eSIM.

items.q: Can I share my internet hotspot?
items.a: Most compatible devices support hotspot tethering and data sharing with this plan, depending on local carrier restrictions.
